name: James McIntosh
text: It was very quick and easy and I didn’t have to do anything—he did all the work!

name: Josh
text: Knew what he was doing and solved my problem without difficulty.

name: Bonnie E
text: Cole was precise, knowledgeable, and fixed my issue quickly. His rate is very reasonable. I would give him 5 stars!

name: Donna
text: Cole was prompt, courteous, and knowledgeable. It’s nice having someone in the neighborhood. Very reasonable rates!

name: Jim
text: He methodically worked through a complex issue until he found the solution. We were thrilled!

name: Anonymous
text: Cole helped me with a long list of computer annoyances—very patient and helpful!

name: Anonymous
text: Cole was very professional, knowledgeable, and friendly. He upgraded my desktop, installed new software, and gave great advice on purchasing a laptop!

name: Anonymous
text: Cole just helped my husband set up and learn about his new Apple Watch. He is patient, knowledgeable, and a pleasure to work with.

name: Katelyn
text: Cole is amazing with computers, I always go to him when I need tech help!

name: Garrett Musick
text: Cole is very helpful and considerate and worked through my issue efficiently and fixed everything.

name: Adam P
text: Cole is tip top.  His calm kind interactions ease everything, and his knowledge and adeptness are superb.  He re-installed all of our computers, printers, back-ups, cloud connections, plus dealt with our Ring and our TV streaming in one afternoon. Highly recommended!
